ideas.thesis: the name screens well because it combines positive price leadership with above-median operating quality and valuation support.
ideas.risk: price volatility is above a typical large-cap profile.

ideas.thesis: the signal is more tactical than deep value, with strength driven by the current factor mix rather than one single cheapness metric.
ideas.risk: DCF support is limited at the current price.
